name: Medication Reconciliation Codes
description: CPT codes for medication reconciliation services including transitional care management, discharge medication reconciliation, pharmacologic management, and medication therapy management. Used in care transitions and medication reconciliation quality measures (MRP).
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Transitional care management services with moderate medical decision complexity; communication within 2 business days of discharge, face-to-face visit within 14 days of discharge
Transitional care management services with high medical decision complexity; communication within 2 business days of discharge, face-to-face visit within 7 days of discharge
Discharge medications reconciled with the current medication list in outpatient medical record
Pharmacologic management, including prescription and review of medication, when performed with psychotherapy services
Medication therapy management service(s) provided by a pharmacist, individual, face-to-face, initial 15 minutes, new patient
Medication therapy management service(s) provided by a pharmacist, individual, face-to-face, initial 15 minutes, established patient
